# PERF-160 positive: sql.Open inside a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-160-vulnerable.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
)

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	db, _ := sql.Open("postgres", "host=localhost")
	defer db.Close()
	_ = db
}
